privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic GIS data generated during environment setup. Sample polygon layer (sample_polygon.geojson) contains 2 polygon features named Area A and Area B at coordinates spanning -122.5 to -121.9 longitude and 37.5 to 37.8 latitude. Sample point layer (sample_points.geojson) contains 3 point features named Point A, Point B, and Point C. Both datasets use WGS84 coordinate system (OGC CRS84). The expected PDF output is generated at /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/sample_map.pdf with the title 'San Francisco Bay Area - GIS Sample Data' and layout name 'Sample Data Map'. All coordinates are realistic for the stated San Francisco Bay Area region.
